mapper.select:
SELECT count (1) FROM DAC_RECONCILIATION_ANALYSIS
1=1
and LINK_TYPE = #{linkType}
and CHECK_TIME >= to_date(#{startCheckTime},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss')
and CHECK_TIME <= to_date(#{endCheckTime},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss')
and lower(RESOURCE_NAME) like lower(#{resourceNameLike})

SELECT days.dataTime dataTime, S.ACCESS_PROVIDER proAccessCount, S.STANDARD_PROVIDER proStandardCount, S.STORAGE_PROVIDER proStorageCount FROM ( SELECT to_char( to_date( #{dataTime}, 'yyyy-MM-dd' ) - LEVEL + 1, 'yyyy-MM-dd' ) dataTime FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 8 ) days LEFT JOIN ( SELECT to_char( DATA_TIME, 'yyyy-MM-dd' ) dataTime, ACCESS_PROVIDER, STANDARD_PROVIDER, STORAGE_PROVIDER FROM DAC_BILL_LINK_STATISTIC WHERE RESOURCE_ID = #{resourceId} ) S ON days.dataTime = S.dataTime
select distinct DATA_TIME from DAC_BILL_LINK_STATISTIC
SELECT SJZYMC, BZSJXJBM, SJJRF_DZDBH, SJTS, SCSJ_RQSJ, DZDZTDM, DZSJ_RQSJ, XXRWBH, SJ_DZWJMC FROM DAC_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE BZSJXJBM = #{BZSJXJBM} AND XXRWBH = #{XXRWBH} AND SJ_DZWJMC IS NOT NULL
select * from DAC_ACCEPTOR_BILL where SJJRF_DZDBH = #{SJJRF_DZDBH} and SJ_DZWJMC is null
select * from DAC_PROVIDER_BILL where SJTGF_DZDBH = #{SJTGF_DZDBH} and SJ_DZWJMC is null
mapper.update: INSERT INTO DAC_ACCEPTOR_BILL as P ( SJJRF_DZDBH,SJJSWZ_JYQK, SJCCXSDM,SJZYBSF, SJZYMC,BZSJXJBM, SJTS,SJ_DZWJDX, SJQSBH,SJJWBH, SJJYZ,SJJYSFMC, SCSB_DZDBH,SCSJ_RQSJ, SJJRFGLY_XM,SJJRFGLY_LXDH, XXRWBH,DZZDHJ, DZDZTDM,DZFFDM) SELECT MAX( SJJRF_DZDBH ) SJJRF_DZDBH, MAX( SJJSWZ_JYQK ) SJJSWZ_JYQK, MAX( SJCCXSDM ) SJCCXSDM, MAX( SJZYBSF ) SJZYBSF, MAX( SJZYMC ) SJZYMC, MAX( BZSJXJBM ) BZSJXJBM, SUM( SJTS ) SJTS,SUM (SJ_DZWJDX) SJ_DZWJDX, MIN( SJQSBH ) SJQSBH, MAX( SJJWBH ) SJJWBH, MAX( SJJYZ ) SJJYZ,MAX( SJJYSFMC ) SJJYSFMC, MIN( SCSB_DZDBH ) SCSB_DZDBH,EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::INTEGER, MAX( SJJRFGLY_XM ) SJJRFGLY_XM,MAX( SJJRFGLY_LXDH ) SJJRFGLY_LXDH, MAX( XXRWBH ) XXRWBH, '1', 3, '0' from DAC_ACCESS_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE SCSJ_RQSJ >= #{startDate} and SCSJ_RQSJ <= #{endDate} GROUP BY BZSJXJBM,XXRWBH ON CONFLICT(SJJRF_DZDBH) DO UPDATE SET SJTS = EXCLUDED.SJTS+P.SJTS where EXCLUDED.XXRWBH=P.XXRWBH and EXCLUDED.BZSJXJBM = P.BZSJXJBM and EXCLUDED.DZZDHJ = '1'

INSERT INTO DAC_PROVIDER_BILL as P ( SJTGF_DZDBH,SJJSWZ_JYQK, SJCCXSDM, SJZYBSF, SJ_DZWJMC, SJZYMC, BZSJXJBM, SJTS, SJ_DZWJDX, SJQSBH, SJJWBH, SJJYZ, SJJYSFMC, SCSB_DZDBH, SCSJ_RQSJ, SJTGFGLY_XM, SJTGFGLY_LXDH, XXRWBH, DZZDHJ ) SELECT MAX( SJTGF_DZDBH ) SJTGF_DZDBH, MAX( SJJSWZ_JYQK ) SJJSWZ_JYQK, MAX( SJCCXSDM ) SJCCXSDM, MAX( SJZYBSF ) SJZYBSF, MAX( SJ_DZWJMC ) SJ_DZWJMC, MAX( SJZYMC ) SJZYMC, MAX( BZSJXJBM ) BZSJXJBM, SUM( SJTS ) SJTS, SUM( SJ_DZWJDX ) SJ_DZWJDX, MIN( SJQSBH ) SJQSBH, MAX( SJJWBH ) SJJWBH, MAX( SJJYZ ) SJJYZ, MIN( SJJYSFMC ) SJJYSFMC, MIN( SCSB_DZDBH ) SCSB_DZDBH, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::INTEGER, MAX( SJTGFGLY_XM ) SJTGFGLY_XM, MAX( SJTGFGLY_LXDH ) SJTGFGLY_LXDH, MAX( XXRWBH ) XXRWBH,'1' FROM DAC_ACCESS_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE SCSJ_RQSJ >= #{startDate} and SCSJ_RQSJ <= #{endDate} GROUP BY BZSJXJBM,XXRWBH ON CONFLICT(SJTGF_DZDBH) DO UPDATE SET SJTS = EXCLUDED.SJTS+P.SJTS WHERE P.BZSJXJBM = EXCLUDED.BZSJXJBM AND P.XXRWBH = EXCLUDED.XXRWBH AND EXCLUDED.DZZDHJ = '1'

INSERT INTO DAC_ACCEPTOR_BILL as P ( SJJRF_DZDBH,SJJSWZ_JYQK, SJCCXSDM,SJZYBSF, SJZYMC,BZSJXJBM, SJTS,SJ_DZWJDX, SJQSBH,SJJWBH, SJJYZ,SJJYSFMC, SCSB_DZDBH,SCSJ_RQSJ, SJJRFGLY_XM,SJJRFGLY_LXDH, XXRWBH,DZZDHJ, DZDZTDM,DZFFDM) SELECT MAX( SJJRF_DZDBH ) SJJRF_DZDBH, MAX( SJJSWZ_JYQK ) SJJSWZ_JYQK, MAX( SJCCXSDM ) SJCCXSDM, MAX( SJZYBSF ) SJZYBSF, MAX( SJZYMC ) SJZYMC, MAX( BZSJXJBM ) BZSJXJBM, SUM( SJTS ) SJTS,SUM (SJ_DZWJDX) SJ_DZWJDX, MIN( SJQSBH ) SJQSBH, MAX( SJJWBH ) SJJWBH, MAX( SJJYZ ) SJJYZ,MAX( SJJYSFMC ) SJJYSFMC, MIN( SCSB_DZDBH ) SCSB_DZDBH,EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::INTEGER, MAX( SJJRFGLY_XM ) SJJRFGLY_XM,MAX( SJJRFGLY_LXDH ) SJJRFGLY_LXDH, MAX( XXRWBH ) XXRWBH, '2', 3, '0' from DAC_STANDARD_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE SCSJ_RQSJ >= #{startDate} and SCSJ_RQSJ <= #{endDate} GROUP BY BZSJXJBM,XXRWBH ON CONFLICT(SJJRF_DZDBH) DO UPDATE SET SJTS = EXCLUDED.SJTS+P.SJTS where EXCLUDED.XXRWBH=P.XXRWBH and EXCLUDED.BZSJXJBM = P.BZSJXJBM and EXCLUDED.DZZDHJ = '2'

INSERT INTO DAC_PROVIDER_BILL as P ( SJTGF_DZDBH,SJJSWZ_JYQK, SJCCXSDM, SJZYBSF, SJ_DZWJMC, SJZYMC, BZSJXJBM, SJTS, SJ_DZWJDX, SJQSBH, SJJWBH, SJJYZ, SJJYSFMC, SCSB_DZDBH, SCSJ_RQSJ, SJTGFGLY_XM, SJTGFGLY_LXDH, XXRWBH, DZZDHJ ) SELECT MAX( SJTGF_DZDBH ) SJTGF_DZDBH, MAX( SJJSWZ_JYQK ) SJJSWZ_JYQK, MAX( SJCCXSDM ) SJCCXSDM, MAX( SJZYBSF ) SJZYBSF, MAX( SJ_DZWJMC ) SJ_DZWJMC, MAX( SJZYMC ) SJZYMC, MAX( BZSJXJBM ) BZSJXJBM, SUM( SJTS ) SJTS, SUM( SJ_DZWJDX ) SJ_DZWJDX, MIN( SJQSBH ) SJQSBH, MAX( SJJWBH ) SJJWBH, MAX( SJJYZ ) SJJYZ, MIN( SJJYSFMC ) SJJYSFMC, MIN( SCSB_DZDBH ) SCSB_DZDBH, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::INTEGER, MAX( SJTGFGLY_XM ) SJTGFGLY_XM, MAX( SJTGFGLY_LXDH ) SJTGFGLY_LXDH, MAX( XXRWBH ) XXRWBH,'2' FROM DAC_ACCESS_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE SCSJ_RQSJ >= #{startDate} and SCSJ_RQSJ <= #{endDate} GROUP BY BZSJXJBM,XXRWBH ON CONFLICT(SJTGF_DZDBH) DO UPDATE SET SJTS = EXCLUDED.SJTS+P.SJTS WHERE P.BZSJXJBM = EXCLUDED.BZSJXJBM AND P.XXRWBH = EXCLUDED.XXRWBH AND EXCLUDED.DZZDHJ = '2';

INSERT INTO DAC_ACCEPTOR_BILL as P ( SJJRF_DZDBH,SJJSWZ_JYQK, SJCCXSDM,SJZYBSF, SJZYMC,BZSJXJBM, SJTS,SJ_DZWJDX, SJQSBH,SJJWBH, SJJYZ,SJJYSFMC, SCSB_DZDBH,SCSJ_RQSJ, SJJRFGLY_XM,SJJRFGLY_LXDH, XXRWBH,DZZDHJ, DZDZTDM,DZFFDM) SELECT MAX( SJJRF_DZDBH ) SJJRF_DZDBH, MAX( SJJSWZ_JYQK ) SJJSWZ_JYQK, MAX( SJCCXSDM ) SJCCXSDM, MAX( SJZYBSF ) SJZYBSF, MAX( SJZYMC ) SJZYMC, MAX( BZSJXJBM ) BZSJXJBM, SUM( SJTS ) SJTS,SUM (SJ_DZWJDX) SJ_DZWJDX, MIN( SJQSBH ) SJQSBH, MAX( SJJWBH ) SJJWBH, MAX( SJJYZ ) SJJYZ,MAX( SJJYSFMC ) SJJYSFMC, MIN( SCSB_DZDBH ) SCSB_DZDBH,EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::INTEGER, MAX( SJJRFGLY_XM ) SJJRFGLY_XM,MAX( SJJRFGLY_LXDH ) SJJRFGLY_LXDH, MAX( XXRWBH ) XXRWBH, '3', 3, '0' from DAC_STORAGE_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE SCSJ_RQSJ >= #{startDate} and SCSJ_RQSJ <= #{endDate} GROUP BY BZSJXJBM,XXRWBH ON CONFLICT(SJJRF_DZDBH) DO UPDATE SET SJTS = EXCLUDED.SJTS+P.SJTS where EXCLUDED.XXRWBH=P.XXRWBH and EXCLUDED.BZSJXJBM = P.BZSJXJBM and EXCLUDED.DZZDHJ = '3'

INSERT INTO DAC_PROVIDER_BILL as P ( SJTGF_DZDBH,SJJSWZ_JYQK, SJCCXSDM, SJZYBSF, SJ_DZWJMC, SJZYMC, BZSJXJBM, SJTS, SJ_DZWJDX, SJQSBH, SJJWBH, SJJYZ, SJJYSFMC, SCSB_DZDBH, SCSJ_RQSJ, SJTGFGLY_XM, SJTGFGLY_LXDH, XXRWBH, DZZDHJ ) SELECT MAX( SJTGF_DZDBH ) SJTGF_DZDBH, MAX( SJJSWZ_JYQK ) SJJSWZ_JYQK, MAX( SJCCXSDM ) SJCCXSDM, MAX( SJZYBSF ) SJZYBSF, MAX( SJ_DZWJMC ) SJ_DZWJMC, MAX( SJZYMC ) SJZYMC, MAX( BZSJXJBM ) BZSJXJBM, SUM( SJTS ) SJTS, SUM( SJ_DZWJDX ) SJ_DZWJDX, MIN( SJQSBH ) SJQSBH, MAX( SJJWBH ) SJJWBH, MAX( SJJYZ ) SJJYZ, MIN( SJJYSFMC ) SJJYSFMC, MIN( SCSB_DZDBH ) SCSB_DZDBH, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::INTEGER, MAX( SJTGFGLY_XM ) SJTGFGLY_XM, MAX( SJTGFGLY_LXDH ) SJTGFGLY_LXDH, MAX( XXRWBH ) XXRWBH,'3' FROM DAC_STORAGE_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE SCSJ_RQSJ >= #{startDate} and SCSJ_RQSJ <= #{endDate} GROUP BY BZSJXJBM,XXRWBH ON CONFLICT(SJTGF_DZDBH) DO UPDATE SET SJTS = EXCLUDED.SJTS+P.SJTS WHERE P.BZSJXJBM = EXCLUDED.BZSJXJBM AND P.XXRWBH = EXCLUDED.XXRWBH AND EXCLUDED.DZZDHJ = '3';
mapper.select:
SELECT A.SJJRF_DZDBH acceptorBillNo, A.SJTS accDataCount, A.BZSJXJBM resourceId, A.XXRWBH inceptDataTime, A.DZZDHJ accBillLink, P.SJTGF_DZDBH providerBillNo, P.SJTS proDataCount FROM ( ( SELECT SJJRF_DZDBH, SJTS, BZSJXJBM, XXRWBH, DZZDHJ FROM DAC_ACCEPTOR_BILL
SCSJ_RQSJ >= #{startDate} and SCSJ_RQSJ <= #{endDate} AND DZZDHJ = #{acceptorLink} AND DZDZTDM != 1 AND SJ_DZWJMC IS NULL
BZSJXJBM = #{BZSJXJBM} AND XXRWBH = #{XXRWBH} AND DZZDHJ = #{DZZDHJ} AND SJ_DZWJMC IS NULL
) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SJTGF_DZDBH, SJTS, BZSJXJBM, XXRWBH FROM DAC_PROVIDER_BILL
SCSJ_RQSJ >= #{startDate} and SCSJ_RQSJ <= #{endDate} AND DZZDHJ = #{providerLink} AND SJ_DZWJMC IS NULL
BZSJXJBM = #{BZSJXJBM} AND XXRWBH = #{XXRWBH} AND DZZDHJ = #{DZZDHJ} AND SJ_DZWJMC IS NULL
) P ON A.BZSJXJBM = P.BZSJXJBM AND A.XXRWBH = P.XXRWBH )

SELECT * FROM ( ( SELECT MAX( SJJRF_DZDBH ) acceptorBillNo, MAX( BZSJXJBM ) accResourceId, SUM( SJTS ) accDataCount, SUM( SJ_DZWJDX ) accDataSize, MAX( SJJYZ ) accDataFingerprint, MAX( SJJYSFMC ) accFingerprintType, MIN( SJQSBH ) accStartNo, MAX( SJJWBH ) accEndNo, MAX( SJJSWZ_JYQK ) accSourceLocation, MAX( DZFFDM ) accCheckMethod, MAX( SCSB_DZDBH ) accLastFailBill, MIN( SCSJ_RQSJ ) accDataArriveTime, MAX( SJZYMC ) accDataSourceName, MAX( SJJRFGLY_XM ) accDataAdministrator, MAX( SJJRFGLY_LXDH ) accAdministratorTel, MAX( SJCCXSDM ) accDataSourceType, MAX( XXRWBH ) accInceptDataTime, SJ_DZWJMC accInceptDataId FROM DAC_STORAGE_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE BZSJXJBM = #{BZSJXJBM} and XXRWBH = #{XXRWBH} GROUP BY SJ_DZWJMC, XXRWBH ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX( SJTGF_DZDBH ) providerBillNo, MAX( BZSJXJBM ) proResourceId, SUM( SJTS ) proDataCount, SUM( SJ_DZWJDX ) proDataSize, MAX( SJJYZ ) proDataFingerprint, MAX( SJJYSFMC ) proFingerPrintType, MIN( SJQSBH ) proStartNo, MAX( SJJWBH ) proEndNo, MAX( SJJSWZ_JYQK ) proSourceLocation, MIN( SCSB_DZDBH ) proLastFailBill, MIN( SCSJ_RQSJ ) proDataSendTime, MAX( SJZYMC ) proDataSourceName, MAX( SJTGFGLY_XM ) proDataAdministrator, MAX( SJTGFGLY_LXDH ) proAdministratorTel, MAX( SJCCXSDM ) proDataSourceType, MAX( XXRWBH ) proInceptDataTime, SJ_DZWJMC proInceptDataId FROM DAC_STANDARD_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE BZSJXJBM = #{BZSJXJBM} and XXRWBH = #{XXRWBH} GROUP BY SJ_DZWJMC, XXRWBH ) P ON P.proInceptDataTime = A.accInceptDataTime AND P.proInceptDataId = A.accInceptDataId )

SELECT * FROM ( ( SELECT MAX( SJJRF_DZDBH ) acceptorBillNo, MAX( BZSJXJBM ) accResourceId, SUM( SJTS ) accDataCount, SUM( SJ_DZWJDX ) accDataSize, MAX( SJJYZ ) accDataFingerprint, MAX( SJJYSFMC ) accFingerprintType, MIN( SJQSBH ) accStartNo, MAX( SJJWBH ) accEndNo, MAX( SJJSWZ_JYQK ) accSourceLocation, MAX( DZFFDM ) accCheckMethod, MIN( SCSB_DZDBH ) accLastFailBill, MIN( SCSJ_RQSJ ) accDataArriveTime, MAX( SJZYMC ) accDataSourceName, MAX( SJJRFGLY_XM ) accAdministrator, MAX( SJJRFGLY_LXDH ) accAdministratorTel, MAX( SJCCXSDM ) accDataSourceType, MAX( XXRWBH ) accInceptDataTime, SJ_DZWJMC accInceptDataId FROM DAC_STANDARD_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE BZSJXJBM = #{BZSJXJBM} and XXRWBH = #{XXRWBH} GROUP BY SJ_DZWJMC, XXRWBH ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX( SJTGF_DZDBH ) providerBillNo, MAX( BZSJXJBM ) proResourceId, SUM( SJTS ) proDataCount, SUM( SJ_DZWJDX ) proDataSize, MAX( SJJYZ ) proDataFingerprint, MAX( SJJYSFMC ) proFingerprintType, MIN( SJQSBH ) proStartNo, MAX( SJJWBH ) proEndNo, MAX( SJJSWZ_JYQK ) proSourceLocation, MIN( SCSB_DZDBH ) proLastFailBill, MIN( SCSJ_RQSJ ) proDataSendTime, MAX( SJZYMC ) proDataSourceName, MAX( DATA_ADMINISTRATOR ) proAdministrator, MIN( SJTGFGLY_XM ) proAdministratorTel, MAX( SJTGFGLY_LXDH ) proDataSourceType, MAX( XXRWBH ) proInceptDataTime, SJ_DZWJDX proInceptDataId FROM DAC_ACCESS_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE BZSJXJBM = #{BZSJXJBM} and XXRWBH = #{XXRWBH} GROUP BY SJ_DZWJMC, XXRWBH ) P ON P.proInceptDataTime = A.accInceptDataTime AND P.proInceptDataId = A.accInceptDataId )

SELECT A.*, P.proAccessCount FROM ( (SELECT BZSJXJBM resourceId, MAX(SJZYMC) resourceName, MIN(DZYQSJFW_KSSJ) dataTime, SUM( CASE WHEN DZZDHJ = 1 THEN SJTS ELSE 0 END ) accAccessCount, SUM( CASE WHEN DZZDHJ = 2 THEN SJTS ELSE 0 END ) accStandardCount FROM DAC_ACCEPTOR_INVENTORY_BILL WHERE DZYQSJFW_KSSJ = #{dateTime} GROUP BY BZSJXJBM) A LEFT JOIN (SELECT BZSJXJBM, SUM( CASE WHEN DZZDHJ = 1 THEN SJTS ELSE 0 END ) proAccessCount FROM DAC_PROVIDER_INVENTORY_BILL WHERE DZYQSJFW_KSSJ = #{dateTime} GROUP BY BZSJXJBM) P ON P.BZSJXJBM = A.resourceId )

SELECT A.*, P.proStandardCount, P.proStorageCount FROM ( (SELECT BZSJXJBM resourceId, MAX(SJZYMC) resourceName, MIN(DZYQSJFW_KSSJ) dataTime, SUM( CASE WHEN DZZDHJ = 3 THEN SJTS ELSE 0 END ) accStorageCount FROM DAC_ACCEPTOR_INVENTORY_BILL WHERE DZYQSJFW_KSSJ = #{dateTime} GROUP BY BZSJXJBM) A LEFT JOIN (SELECT BZSJXJBM, SUM( CASE WHEN DZZDHJ = 2 THEN SJTS ELSE 0 END ) proStandardCount, SUM( CASE WHEN DZZDHJ = 3 THEN SJTS ELSE 0 END ) proStorageCount FROM DAC_PROVIDER_INVENTORY_BILL WHERE DZYQSJFW_KSSJ = #{dateTime} GROUP BY BZSJXJBM) P ON P.BZSJXJBM = A.resourceId )

SELECT BZSJXJBM resourceId, MAX(SJZYMC) resourceName, MAX(DZZDHJ) linkType, COUNT( 1 ) sumCount, SUM( CASE WHEN DZDZTDM = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) successCount, SUM( CASE WHEN DZDZTDM = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) failCount FROM DAC_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE DZZDHJ = #{linkType} AND SCSJ_RQSJ >= #{startDate} AND SCSJ_RQSJ <= #{endDate} GROUP BY BZSJXJBM

SELECT RESOURCE_ID resourceId, RESOURCE_NAME resourceName, ACCESS_ACCEPTOR accAccessCount, ACCESS_PROVIDER proAccessCount, STANDARD_ACCEPTOR accStandardCount, STANDARD_PROVIDER proStandardCount, STORAGE_ACCEPTOR accStorageCount, STORAGE_PROVIDER proStorageCount, ACCESS_SAME_PERIOD accessSamePeriod, STANDARD_CHAIN_RATIO standardChainRatio, STORAGE_CHAIN_RATIO storageChainRatio, DATA_TIME dataTime, STATISTIC_TIME statisticTime, ALARM_STATE alarmState, IS_PUSH isPush, ACCESS_ACCEPTOR_PRE accAccessCountPre, ACCESS_PROVIDER_PRE proAccessCountPre FROM DAC_BILL_LINK_STATISTIC WHERE dataTime = to_date(#{dateTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss')

select P.*,A.proDataCount from ((SELECT BZSJXJBM resourceId, SUM(SJTS) accDataCount, MIN(SJQSBH) , MAX(SJZYMC) resourceId FROM DAC_ACCEPTOR_INVENTORY_BILL WHERE DZZDHJ = #{linkType} AND DZYQSJFW_KSSJ = to_date(#{dateTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') GROUP BY BZSJXJBM) P LEFT JOIN (SELECT BZSJXJBM, SUM(SJTS) proDataCount FROM DAC_PROVIDER_INVENTORY_BILL WHERE DZZDHJ = #{linkType} AND DZYQSJFW_KSSJ = to_date(#{dateTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') GROUP BY BZSJXJBM) A ON P.BZSJXJBM = A.BZSJXJBM )
SELECT count(1) FROM DAC_BILL_LINK_STATISTIC WHERE ALARM_STATE = 2 AND DATA_TIME = to_date(#{dataTime}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss')
select distinct SCSJ_RQSJ from DAC_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE DZZDHJ = #{DZZDHJ}
